claim.summary: A live delegated queue completed five git-backed built-in repo_sandbox jobs, including standalone git review/repair tasks and a shared-repo worker/merge acceptance trio, with trusted clean evidence and no active lease residue.

code_changes: No production code change was required for r13.
r13 adds a temporary isolated proof driver under /tmp to exercise git-backed repo_sandbox queue continuity.

isolated_cli_r13.preflight_mode: drain --enforce-preflight 0 because host bubblewrap preflight is unavailable in this environment
isolated_cli_r13.git_policy: enabled only for this isolated proof via --allow-git-commands 1

open_limits: This is a bounded 31-second repo_sandbox proof, not a long production-duty role.
The proof enables git commands for the isolated job queue, but still uses the host's unavailable bubblewrap path with --enforce-preflight 0.
The packet proves git-backed queue continuity and shared-repo acceptance, but does not combine real interruption/resume with git-backed work in the same run.
A stronger full A5 claim still needs longer wall-clock role continuity combining ordinary intake, git-backed work, real restart/resume, and natural closeout without operator steering.
